exercises.title: Welcome to Chapter 2
exercises.body: You've read the whole alphabet's core sounds. This chapter finishes the job with the rarest letters, then moves on to reading full sentences with confidence.

exercises.title: Meet measure
exercises.body: The letter for measure is 𐑠 — the “zh” sound buried in the middle of measure, vision, and treasure. It's one of the rarest sounds in English, so you'll spot it far less often than its neighbors.

exercises.prompt: Which letter makes the “zh” sound, as in “measure”?
